name: Casa Cataleya
description:
Escape to the sun-drenched paradise of Costa Del Sol and indulge in the ultimate holiday experience at our stunning 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom modern apartment on the New Golden Mile. Nestled within the prestigious Cataleya urbanisation, adjacent to the esteemed Atalaya golf club, and just minutes away from the renowned Puerto Banús, this property offers a haven of luxury and tranquillity.

Boasting a prime location in one of the region's most exclusive settings, this apartment is perfectly positioned between Marbella and Estepona, with the charming village of Benahavis just a short drive away – ideal for exploring its renowned culinary scene.

Step inside and be captivated by the spacious interiors, flooded with natural light streaming through expansive floor-to-ceiling windows. The open-plan living room, kitchen, and dining area seamlessly blend together, creating a welcoming atmosphere for relaxation and entertainment.

The standout feature of this apartment is undoubtedly the expansive 81 m2 terrace, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the surrounding landscape. Whether you're enjoying an alfresco meal or lounging in the sun-drenched seating area, you'll relish every moment of outdoor living in this idyllic setting.

Retreat to the generously sized master bedroom, complete with an en suite bathroom with double wash basin and walk-in shower, or unwind in the comfort of the spacious 2nd bedroom featuring built-in closets – both designed with your utmost comfort in mind.

Outside, the residential gated community boasts a lush botanic garden, while the highlight awaits with the spectacular 450 m2 outdoor lagoon pool with saltwater, complemented by a heated indoor pool – perfect for leisurely swims year-round.

Don't miss the opportunity to immerse yourself in the epitome of holiday luxury at our exquisite Costa Del Sol retreat. Book now and discover the perfect blend of opulence and tranquillity for an unforgettable getaway!

Please note that we welcome families and couples only, no groups under 30, and no hen or stag parties. Should you fall outside of this category but wish to book nonetheless, please send us an enquiry detailing a bit more about yourself and the group that you will be travelling with so we can request this for you.

We look forward to welcoming you!
rules: No groups under 30 years of age
map_query: Casa Cataleya, Estepona, Costa del Sol, Spain
